extension.description: Antigravity multi-account switching and quota management assistant
command.openSwitchLogs: Antigravity Cockpit: Open Account Switching Logs Directory
config.autoRefreshInterval.description: Time interval (minutes) for automatic account quota info refresh. Set to 0 to disable automatic refresh.
config.switchMode.description: Account switching mode: 'safe' only switches the current account in the plugin and prompts for manual IDE restart; 'advanced' calls an external proxy process to perform Kill → Database Injection → Automatic IDE Restart flow.
config.databasePathOverride.description: Global status database path override for Antigravity IDE (leave empty for platform default). Example: C:\Users\xxx\AppData\Roaming\Antigravity\User\globalStorage\state.vscdb
config.antigravityExecutablePath.win32.d: Antigravity.exe path override for Windows (leave empty for default path LOCALAPPDATA\Programs\Antigravity\Antigravity.exe)
Antigravity.app path override for macOS (leave empty for default path /Applications/Antigravity.app)
config.antigravityExecutablePath.linux.d: Antigravity executable path override for Linux (leave empty to try common paths)
config.processWaitSeconds.description: Time to wait (seconds) for process closing/starting during account switching. Recommended 20-30 seconds for lower-end machines.
config.language.description: Interface language: 'auto' follows VS Code settings, 'zh-cn' for Simplified Chinese, 'en' for English.
